text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: In the face of a door that refuses to open!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! It appears the frost has sealed it
shut!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! That can't be... Wh-what should we do,
Opera O?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, there's no need to panic. Let us simply
continue with our opera lesson.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do as such, and my fiery passion should melt the
ice away. Let us resume where we were!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I know that I will fight you, if you can't teach me
to fear!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Do your best, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Victory goes to me! And so, you are of my
possession! My fires shall melt your ice, Turandot!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: That was wonderful, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The love I desired for so long burns with joy! A joy
so strong that I must cry out to the heavens!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: La la laaa... ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Isolde... You belong to me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Doto, it's your line!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, me?! Uh, uh, all right!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Tr-Tristan... You belong to me!

text_block_list.name: Doto & Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark! There lies no greater happiness than that of
love!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Slide...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Are you two okay? It was getting so late, and I
had no clue where you were...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha, but I suppose there was nothing to worry
about. The both of you kept yourselves well
entertained. ♪
